projectName: AI-powered Intelligent Energy & Mobility Optimization Platform
shortDescription: AI-powered optimization platform for EV energy management with 20–30% battery life improvement.
overview: Urjeevi Labs delivers an AI-powered intelligent energy and mobility optimization platform for EV owners, fleet operators, and logistics companies across Maharashtra.
problemStatement: Inefficient EV battery utilization, charging optimization and predictive maintenance.
solution: AI-powered optimization platform for EV energy management.

keyFeatures.name: Battery Optimization
keyFeatures.description: Extends battery life by 20–30% through AI-driven charging and usage analytics.

keyFeatures.name: Predictive Maintenance
keyFeatures.description: Early fault detection and maintenance scheduling for EV fleets.

keyFeatures.name: Fleet Analytics
keyFeatures.description: Real-time fleet performance, energy consumption, and route analytics.

keyFeatures.name: Charging Optimization
keyFeatures.description: Smart charging schedules for 2, 3, and 4-wheeler EV categories.

valueProposition: 20–30% battery life improvement, lower operational cost, predictive maintenance.

projectName: Farm-Level Weather Monitoring & Forecasting using Physics, Data and AI/ML
shortDescription: AI-powered hyperlocal weather forecasting with 95% accuracy for precision farming and climate resilience.
overview: Weathercast Solutions provides farm-level weather monitoring and forecasting using Automatic Weather Stations, physics-based models, and machine learning.
problemStatement: Lack of accurate farm-level weather forecasts for precision farming and climate resilience.
solution: AI-powered weather forecasting platform using Automatic Weather Stations (AWS), physics-based models, and machine learning.

keyFeatures.name: Hyperlocal Weather Forecasting
keyFeatures.description: Plot-level forecasts with up to 3-hour forecast window.

keyFeatures.name: Crop Advisory Services
keyFeatures.description: Crop-specific recommendations based on weather intelligence.

keyFeatures.name: AI-driven Decision Support
keyFeatures.description: Integrated analytics for sowing, irrigation, and harvest decisions.

keyFeatures.name: Real-time Weather Monitoring
keyFeatures.description: Continuous monitoring via IoT sensor network.

keyFeatures.name: Mobile & Web Dashboard
keyFeatures.description: Accessible farm intelligence via mobile and web platforms.

valueProposition: 95% forecast accuracy, improved productivity, optimized irrigation, reduced crop losses.
expansionPlan: Expand across Vidarbha and Marathwada regions of Maharashtra.

projectName: Oxland Agri – Future-Ready Platform for Agricultural Land Acquisition & Management
shortDescription: AI and GIS-powered platform for agricultural land visualization, cadastral mapping, and land acquisition.
overview: Oxland Agri is a future-ready platform for agricultural land acquisition and management, enabling transparent digital land records and AI-driven decision support.
problemStatement: Manual, fragmented agricultural land acquisition and management processes leading to inefficiencies and lack of transparency.
solution: AI and GIS-powered platform for agricultural land visualization, cadastral mapping, land acquisition, and decision support.

keyFeatures.name: Agricultural Land Identification
keyFeatures.description: High-resolution identification and mapping of agricultural parcels.

keyFeatures.name: Cadastral Record Visualization
keyFeatures.description: Digital visualization of land titles and cadastral records.

keyFeatures.name: Crop Suitability Analysis
keyFeatures.description: AI-driven analysis of crop suitability for land parcels.

keyFeatures.name: Investment Planning
keyFeatures.description: Tools for agri-investment planning and due diligence.

keyFeatures.name: Land Use Monitoring
keyFeatures.description: Change detection and ongoing land use monitoring.

valueProposition: Digital land records, improved transparency, faster land acquisition, AI-driven decision support, reduced cost and complexity.
expansionPlan: Extend to Punjab, Uttar Pradesh, and Rajasthan for agri-corridor development.

shortDescription: AI-powered satellite imagery analytics for precision farming, soil health, and irrigation planning.
overview: SparkyAI combines satellite imagery with ground data to provide actionable agricultural insights for farmers, FPOs, and government agencies in Northeast India.
problemStatement: Limited access to field-level intelligence for precision agriculture, crop planning, irrigation, and soil monitoring.
solution: AI-powered platform combining satellite imagery with ground data to provide actionable agricultural insights and decision support.

keyFeatures.name: Precision Farming Analytics
keyFeatures.description: Field-level crop health and productivity analytics from satellite data.

keyFeatures.name: Soil Health Monitoring
keyFeatures.description: Spectral analysis for soil health assessment and monitoring.

keyFeatures.name: Irrigation Planning
keyFeatures.description: Data-driven irrigation scheduling and water stress detection.

keyFeatures.name: Crop Health & Stress Monitoring
keyFeatures.description: Early detection of crop stress and anomaly mapping.

keyFeatures.name: Climate-Resilient Farming Insights
keyFeatures.description: AI recommendations for climate-adaptive farming practices.

valueProposition: Field-level decision support, improved productivity, reduced input costs, sustainable farming practices, AI-driven recommendations.
expansionPlan: Cover entire Brahmaputra valley and expand to Meghalaya and Nagaland.

shortDescription: AI-based DSS integrating IoT, SAR imagery, and geospatial data for intelligent irrigation decisions.
overview: Encode Nature's Intelligent Irrigation Support System optimizes water usage through soil moisture estimation and AI-based irrigation recommendations.
problemStatement: Inefficient irrigation practices due to lack of accurate soil moisture assessment and data-driven irrigation planning.
solution: AI-based Decision Support System (DSS) integrating IoT, weather, soil, SAR satellite imagery, and geospatial data to optimize irrigation decisions.

keyFeatures.name: Soil Moisture Estimation
keyFeatures.description: Multi-source soil moisture estimation using IoT and SAR data.

keyFeatures.name: Intelligent Irrigation Recommendations
keyFeatures.description: AI-optimized irrigation scheduling based on crop and weather.

keyFeatures.name: SAR-based Soil Moisture Mapping
keyFeatures.description: Satellite-derived soil moisture maps for large areas.

keyFeatures.name: Multi-source Geospatial Integration
keyFeatures.description: Fusion of IoT, weather, and satellite geospatial datasets.

keyFeatures.name: Interactive Decision Support Dashboard
keyFeatures.description: Farmer-friendly dashboard for irrigation decision support.

valueProposition: Reduced water consumption, optimized irrigation scheduling, improved crop productivity, enhanced decision-making, sustainable agriculture.
expansionPlan: Validate across 3 agro-climatic zones in AP and Telangana before national rollout.

projectName: Geo-Location Based Skill Census and Job Matching Platform for Rural India
shortDescription: GIS-enabled platform for geo-tagged skill census, job matching, and digital livelihood support in rural India.
overview: GeoInfy maps rural skills geospatially and connects workers with nearby employment through intelligent job matching algorithms.
problemStatement: Limited access to employment opportunities and skill mapping for rural workers due to the absence of location-based workforce intelligence.
solution: GIS-enabled platform for geo-tagged skill census, job matching, workforce mapping, and digital livelihood support.

keyFeatures.name: Geo-tagged Skill Census
keyFeatures.description: Village-level skill mapping with GPS-verified worker profiles.

keyFeatures.name: Location-based Job Matching
keyFeatures.description: AI matching of skills to nearby employment opportunities.

keyFeatures.name: Rural Workforce Mapping
keyFeatures.description: Comprehensive geospatial workforce intelligence dashboards.

keyFeatures.name: SMS-based Job Notifications
keyFeatures.description: Job alerts delivered via SMS for rural accessibility.

keyFeatures.name: Skill Database & Digital Employment Platform
keyFeatures.description: Searchable skill database and digital employment portal.

valueProposition: Faster job matching, improved employment accessibility, reduced migration, searchable skill database, digital inclusion of rural workers.
expansionPlan: Replicate across 50 districts in UP, Bihar, and Jharkhand under Skill India mission.

projectName: DHAAL (Dynamic Heavy Accident Avoidance & Locator System)
shortDescription: AI-powered smart dashcam for real-time road hazard detection, accident alerts, and rider safety.
overview: Viasalus DHAAL integrates HD cameras, GPS, edge AI, and mobile connectivity to detect potholes, accidents, and road hazards in real time for two-wheeler riders.
problemStatement: High accident rates among two-wheeler riders due to poor road conditions, lack of real-time hazard information, delayed emergency response, and absence of affordable accident detection and safety systems.
solution: AI-powered smart dashcam integrating HD wide-angle cameras, GPS, edge AI, and mobile connectivity to detect potholes, blocked roads, waterlogged roads, accidents, and hazards in real time with instant alerts and incident recording.

keyFeatures.name: Real-time Hazard Detection
keyFeatures.description: Detects potholes, road blockages, and waterlogging in real time.

keyFeatures.name: AI-powered Accident Detection
keyFeatures.description: Automatic accident detection with video recording.

keyFeatures.name: GPS-based Hazard Mapping
keyFeatures.description: Crowdsourced road condition and hazard mapping.

keyFeatures.name: Fleet Monitoring
keyFeatures.description: Fleet monitoring and route optimization for operators.

keyFeatures.name: Smart City Road Analytics
keyFeatures.description: Dashboard for government road intelligence and maintenance.

valueProposition: Affordable AI-powered road safety solution improving rider safety, enabling predictive road maintenance, reducing insurance fraud, and supporting government road management.

metrics.label: Deployment Plan
metrics.value: Pilot → Premium App (6–12 mo) → OEM/Fleet (12–18 mo) → Nationwide (24+ mo)

expansionPlan: Pilot → Premium App (6–12 months) → OEM/Fleet Partnerships (12–18 months) → Nationwide Expansion (24+ months).

projectName: FireAudit – AI-Powered Fire Risk Assessment System
shortDescription: AI-driven fire risk assessment platform with automated scoring, object detection, and safety report generation.
overview: FireAudit by Thazhal automates fire risk inspections using AI to detect inflammable objects, generate fire safety scores, and produce compliance reports.
problemStatement: Manual fire risk assessment is time-consuming, inconsistent, and unable to provide early detection of fire hazards in buildings.
solution: AI-driven fire risk assessment platform that detects inflammable objects inside buildings, generates fire safety scores using floor plans, maps object occurrences, and automatically produces fire safety reports with admin validation dashboard.

keyFeatures.name: AI-powered Fire Risk Detection
keyFeatures.description: Automated detection of fire hazards and inflammable objects.

keyFeatures.name: Automated Fire Safety Scoring
keyFeatures.description: Standardized fire safety scores from floor plan analysis.

keyFeatures.name: Floor-wise Object Mapping
keyFeatures.description: Maps object occurrences across building floors.

keyFeatures.name: Fire Safety Report Generation
keyFeatures.description: Automated compliance and insurance readiness reports.

keyFeatures.name: Admin Validation Dashboard
keyFeatures.description: Dashboard for validating AI outputs before publishing.

valueProposition: Automates fire risk inspections without manual site visits, provides standardized scalable assessments, improves compliance and insurance readiness.
environmentalImpact: Reduced emissions from minimized physical inspections
socialImpact: Improved public safety in urban infrastructure

metrics.label: Deployment Plan
metrics.value: Pilot → SaaS → Enterprise & Insurance → B2G Municipal Audits

expansionPlan: Pilot deployment → SaaS subscription dashboard → Enterprise & insurance integration → B2G adoption for municipal safety audits.

shortDescription: AI-powered rural land intelligence platform for plot-level agricultural analytics and credit risk assessment.
overview: Terrastack integrates agricultural productivity, land records, climate stress, water access, and infrastructure data into plot-level geospatial intelligence for banks and government agencies.
problemStatement: Financial institutions and government agencies face challenges in assessing plot-level agricultural risk, land records, climate stress, water availability, and infrastructure due to fragmented geospatial data.
solution: AI-powered rural land intelligence platform integrating analytics on agricultural productivity, land records, climate stress, water access, infrastructure, commercial activity, and land valuation through interactive geospatial dashboards.

keyFeatures.name: Plot-level Agricultural Analytics
keyFeatures.description: Detailed analytics at individual plot level.

keyFeatures.name: Rural Land Intelligence Dashboard
keyFeatures.description: Interactive geospatial visualization and heatmaps.

keyFeatures.name: Credit Underwriting Support
keyFeatures.description: Agricultural credit risk assessment for financial institutions.

keyFeatures.name: Climate Risk Analysis
keyFeatures.description: Drought, flood, and climate stress monitoring.

keyFeatures.name: Policy Planning & Monitoring
keyFeatures.description: Data-driven intervention targeting and portfolio analysis.

valueProposition: Enables accurate agricultural credit risk assessment, improves lending decisions, supports government planning, and enables efficient targeting of agricultural interventions.
expansionPlan: Expand to multiple districts through partnerships with banks, insurers, and government departments.

projectName: Near-Real Time Farm-Level Weather and Soil Information for Precision Agriculture Using Low-Cost IoT Sensors and Geospatial Technologies
shortDescription: Integrated IoT–UAV–Satellite farm intelligence platform for real-time weather, soil, and crop monitoring.
overview: Terraqua combines low-cost IoT sensors, drone-based multispectral imagery, and satellite data into a unified web dashboard for precision agriculture in Varanasi.
problemStatement: Farmers lack access to affordable, real-time farm-level weather, soil, and crop intelligence, leading to inefficient irrigation, poor nutrient management, inaccurate yield forecasting, and reduced climate resilience.
solution: An integrated IoT–UAV–Satellite farm intelligence platform combining low-cost IoT sensors, drone-based multispectral and thermal imagery, and satellite data into a unified web-based dashboard for precision agriculture.

keyFeatures.name: Real-time Farm Monitoring
keyFeatures.description: Continuous weather and soil condition monitoring.

keyFeatures.name: Irrigation Planning
keyFeatures.description: Data-driven irrigation scheduling and decision support.

keyFeatures.name: Soil Nutrient Monitoring
keyFeatures.description: Real-time soil nutrient and health tracking.

keyFeatures.name: Yield Forecasting
keyFeatures.description: AI-based crop yield prediction and planning.

keyFeatures.name: IoT–UAV–Satellite Integration
keyFeatures.description: Unified platform combining all three data sources.

valueProposition: Delivers real-time farm insights integrating IoT, drone, and satellite datasets for smarter irrigation, yield forecasting, and climate-resilient farming.
socialImpact: Empowers farmers with real-time decision support

metrics.label: Deployment Plan
metrics.value: Varanasi pilot → State Agriculture Missions → Nationwide

expansionPlan: Initial pilots in Varanasi, followed by expansion through State Agriculture Missions, KVKs, FPOs, and nationwide deployment.
